overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit downtown street at night. The character navigates past pedestrians with umbrellas and vehicles while towering futuristic buildings with bright holographic advertisements line the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy intersection with neon-lit commercial buildings

events.description: character crosses from asphalt road onto concrete sidewalk
character transitions from running to walking pace

agents.ego_description: character in red jacket crosses the wet intersection and proceeds along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with black umbrella walking alongside the building wall
group of pedestrians with umbrellas walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large commercial structure with bright green neon strip lighting and red triangular logos
floating digital advertisement displaying noodle soup with steam effects
white striped pedestrian crossing on wet reflective asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a rain-soaked intersection in a neon-lit cyberpunk district, moving from the asphalt crosswalk onto the concrete sidewalk. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk alongside the massive green-lit building on the left while holographic advertisements float above the street on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated structures with neon signage

events.description: large black pickup truck pulls up and stops at the curb beside the sidewalk
character passes behind the stopped truck, temporarily blocking view of the street

agents.ego_description: character walks along the crowded sidewalk approaching the stopped truck

notable_agents.action: large black pickup truck stopped at the curb with headlights illuminating the wet pavement
pedestrian in light-colored jacket walking close to the green building wall

entered.detail: building facade with continuous horizontal yellow neon strip lighting
elevated monorail or walkway structure spanning across the street above

segments.scene_description: Walking along the crowded sidewalk beneath elevated structures, the character approaches a large black pickup truck that has stopped at the curb. The green neon building looms close on the left while a yellow-lit building facade appears on the right, with pedestrians navigating the narrow wet walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street with overhead monorail structures and distant towers

events.description: blue sports car drives past the character on the wet street
street opens up with fewer pedestrians and clearer view of distant mega-towers

agents.ego_description: character passes the truck and continues down the sidewalk alongside moving traffic

notable_agents.action: sleek blue sports car driving down the wet street with headlights reflecting off the pavement
black pickup truck receding behind the character

entered.detail: massive illuminated skyscraper rising into the night sky with multiple light levels and spires

segments.scene_description: Having passed the stopped truck, the character continues along the sidewalk as a blue sports car drives past on the street. The space opens up revealing a massive distant tower ahead, while the overhead metal structure passes overhead and the crowd thins out.

scene_state.functional_zone: expansive downtown corridor with towering skyscrapers and floating holographic advertisements

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the surrounding mega-structures and billboards

agents.ego_description: character continues walking while the camera pans up to admire the towering buildings and neon signs above

notable_agents.action: distant figures walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the mega-tower

entered.detail: multiple layered holographic advertisements floating above the street displaying various products

segments.scene_description: The street opens into a vast downtown corridor where the camera tilts upward to reveal the awe-inspiring height of mega-structures and floating holographic billboards. The character walks toward the towering illuminated skyscraper as rain continues to fall on the emptying street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district that transitions from a crowded street intersection into a vast, open downtown corridor. It begins as the character crosses a wet asphalt intersection, moving past pedestrians with umbrellas and floating holographic advertisements toward a concrete sidewalk. As the character walks beneath heavy elevated structures, the scene tightens between a looming green neon building and a yellow-lit facade, passing a large black pickup truck stopped at the curb. The perspective then opens up as a blue sports car drives past and the overhead metal structures recede, revealing a massive distant tower as the crowd begins to thin. Finally, the street expands into a wide urban canyon where the camera tilts upward to capture the awe-inspiring height of illuminated mega-structures and floating billboards under the falling rain.
